blockers.description: FORCE_COLOR=3 is set in this shell; Rich emits ANSI codes and 5 CLI tests fail on plain-text asserts
blockers.workaround: Run ALL pytest with `FORCE_COLOR= NO_COLOR=1` prefix

blockers.description: bg-isolation guard blocks edits in shared checkout; worktree has no .venv
blockers.workaround: Work in worktree gsd-exec2 (already created); .venv already bootstrapped there

blockers.description: gsd-sdk CLI not installed (EACCES on global npm install)
blockers.workaround: Execute GSD workflows manually with git/Write; no gsd-sdk commit/query helpers

decisions.decision: Accept upsert_one +13% regression and re-baseline to 0002
decisions.rationale: It is the intentional fsync(file+dir) durability cost on a single non-batched write; every real loop (refresh/seed/sync/enrich/images) now batches = one fsync per run. Reads ~200x faster, batched refresh ~26x faster. Net win overwhelming. Gate compares Phase 3 against the new 0002 floor.

decisions.decision: Cache is process-global keyed by path.resolve(); find_all returns immutable snapshot
decisions.rationale: Per-request CardRepository construction would defeat a per-instance cache; iterate-while-upsert (enrich) needs a stable snapshot.

decisions.decision: Execute/plan inline (not via subagents) using Sonnet checker only
decisions.rationale: Opus subagents repeatedly dropped the socket on 30-67min runs (planner, pattern-mapper, executor all died). Inline is reliable.

next_action: Re-enter worktree gsd-exec2 (EnterWorktree path), then write .planning/phases/02-data-layer-cache/02-02-SUMMARY.md, re-commit Plan 02-02 cleanly (the WIP commit bundled everything), then VERIFICATION.md + STATE/ROADMAP/REQUIREMENTS updates, then FF-merge to ro and clean up.
context_notes: Phase 2 implementation is functionally COMPLETE and VERIFIED — code works, behavior byte-identical, big speedups proven. What remains is bookkeeping: SUMMARY, VERIFICATION, doc-state updates, and merging the branch to ro. The hard part is done. Run all tests with FORCE_COLOR= NO_COLOR=1. The 0002 baseline filename has an 'uncommited-changes' suffix (pytest-benchmark detected dirty git) — harmless, commit as-is.
